---
title: "Language Acquisition"
---

::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals
:::

| Date | Topic | Reading | Resources |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| 10/29 | Typical development |  Newport & Getz (2025) |  <span class="blue-badge">Slides ↗</span>
| 11/3 | Language deprivation | Ferjan Ramirez et al. (2013) |
| 11/5 | Perinatal stroke | Newport et al. (2022) |
